content.text: I'll dispatch a general-purpose subagent to count the entries in /tmp.

input.prompt: Run the command `ls /tmp` and count how many entries it lists. Report back only the count as a number, along with a one-line confirmation. Use `ls /tmp | wc -l` or equivalent to get an accurate count.
